# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  port:
    name: http
    number: 8080
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-authz
spec:
  server:
    name: service-a-server
  default:
    denied: true
  rules:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          environment: production
      serviceAccountSelector:
        matchLabels:
          role: client
    to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/api/v1/*"]
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  port:
    name: http
    number: 8081
    protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-authz
spec:
  server:
    name: service-b-server
  default:
    denied: true
  rules:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          environment: production
      serviceAccountSelector:
        matchLabels:
          role: client
    to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/api/v2/*"]
